name: OYO Corporation
summary: OYO Corporation provides geological survey services. The company operates in four segments: Infrastructure Maintenance, Management, and Renovation; Natural Disaster Prevention and Mitigation; Environment; and Natural Resources and Energy. The Infrastructure Maintenance, Management, and Renovation segment provides investigation services on infrastructures, building infrastructure maintenance, and management systems; and design and measuring services for disaster-resilient infrastructure, as well as develops and sells non-destructive test equipment, etc. The Natural Disaster Prevention and Mitigation segment engages in the provision of support services to governments in preparing disaster prevention plans; prediction of damages from earthquake, tsunami, fire, and other disasters; investigation, loss estimations, and consultations on countermeasures for natural disaster risks; and development, installation, and renewal of monitoring systems. The Environment segment provides solutions for preservation of biodiversity; soil and groundwater contamination and waste; and asbestos analysis and removal. The Natural Resources and Energy segment offers geological consultation for the power plants; support services for the commercialization of renewable energy; four-dimensional subsea investigation service; research and development services on methane hydrate; and develops systems for natural resource exploration. It also develops, manufactures, sells, leases, and rents various measuring instruments, security instruments, software, and systems. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
